scripts.generate:spec-html: mkdir -p dist && npm run generate:filtered-spec && redocly build-docs generated/dashboard-openapi.yaml --output dist/index.html --title "Dashboard API Reference" --disableGoogleFont --template scripts/redoc-template.hbs && node -e "require('node:fs').copyFileSync('favicon.ico', 'dist/favicon.ico')"

npm run generate:filtered-spec && redocly build-docs public/dashboard-openapi.yaml --output public/dashboardSpec.html --title "Dashboard API Reference" --disableGoogleFont --template scripts/redoc-template.hbs
